name: Ford Canyon Park
description: Ford Canyon Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gallup, NM. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Harold Runnels Athletic Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Harold Runnels Athletic Complex in Gallup, NM! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.
